req.title: Vital signs validation (negative)
req.statement: An Observation with category vital-signs shall have value in clinically plausible range; out-of-range shall be flagged for review. Negative paths including permission denial, missing mandatory elements, and conflicting state transitions must be tested.
expected_outcomes: flag raised if out of range

doc.reasoning: The requirement covers vital-signs Observation validation across four concern areas: (1) normal in-range values accepted, (2) out-of-range values flagged, (3) boundary values at clinical thresholds, (4) missing mandatory elements rejected, and (5) permission denial and conflicting state transitions. Tests are distributed across EP, BVA, STC, DT, and NEG heuristics. Heart-rate (8-300 bpm) is used as the representative vital sign because its range produces clear partition boundaries. Each test is self-contained via a clinician-auth fixture and cleans up any created resources at teardown.

tests.name: test_vital_signs_normal_heart_rate_stored_without_flag
preconditions: Heart rate value 75 bpm is within clinically plausible range (8-300 bpm)
actions: POST /Observation with category vital-signs, code LOINC 8867-4, valueQuantity 75 bpm
Capture HTTP response status and body
expected: No review Task is created for this Observation
trace: R-HLT-069: flag raised only if out of range
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_vital_signs_normal_heart_rate_stored_without_flag(<clinician_auth_headers>, <base_url>, <cleanup_observation>):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Observation",
        "status": "preliminary",
        "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", "code": "vital-signs"}]}],
        "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://loinc.org", "code": "8867-4", "display": "Heart rate"}]},
        "valueQuantity": {"value": 75, "unit": "bpm", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "/min"}
    }
    resp = requests.post(f"{<base_url>}/Observation", json=payload, headers=<clinician_auth_headers>)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    obs_id = body.get("id")
    assert obs_id, "Expected id in response"
    <cleanup_observation>(obs_id)
    task_resp = requests.get(
        f"{<base_url>}/Task",
        params={"focus": f"Observation/{obs_id}", "code": "review"},
        headers=<clinician_auth_headers>
    )
    tasks = task_resp.json().get("entry", [])
    assert len(tasks) == 0, "No review task expected for in-range value"

tests.name: test_vital_signs_out_of_range_heart_rate_creates_review_task
preconditions: Heart rate value 400 bpm is outside clinically plausible range (> 300 bpm)
actions: POST /Observation with category vital-signs, code LOINC 8867-4, valueQuantity 400 bpm
Capture HTTP response status and created Observation id
Query /Task filtering on the created Observation
expected: HTTP 201 Created (observation is stored but flagged)
A review Task resource exists referencing the new Observation
trace: R-HLT-069: out-of-range shall be flagged for review
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_vital_signs_out_of_range_heart_rate_creates_review_task(<clinician_auth_headers>, <base_url>, <cleanup_observation>, <cleanup_task>):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Observation",
        "status": "preliminary",
        "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", "code": "vital-signs"}]}],
        "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://loinc.org", "code": "8867-4"}]},
        "valueQuantity": {"value": 400, "unit": "bpm", "system": "http://unitsofmeasure.org", "code": "/min"}
    }
    resp = requests.post(f"{<base_url>}/Observation", json=payload, headers=<clinician_auth_headers>)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    obs_id = resp.json()["id"]
    <cleanup_observation>(obs_id)
    task_resp = requests.get(
        f"{<base_url>}/Task",
        params={"focus": f"Observation/{obs_id}", "code": "review"},
        headers=<clinician_auth_headers>
    )
    assert task_resp.status_code == 200
    entries = task_resp.json().get("entry", [])
    assert len(entries) >= 1, "Expected a review Task for out-of-range value"
    task = entries[0]["resource"]
    assert task["status"] == "requested"
    <cleanup_task>(task["id"])

tests.name: test_vital_signs_boundary_heart_rate_upper_limit_accepted
preconditions: Heart rate value 300 bpm is the upper inclusive boundary of clinical range
expected: 300 bpm: HTTP 201, no review Task created
trace: R-HLT-069: boundary between plausible and out-of-range
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_vital_signs_boundary_heart_rate_upper_limit(<clinician_auth_headers>, <base_url>, <cleanup_observation>, <cleanup_task>):
    def post_hr(value):
        return requests.post(
            f"{<base_url>}/Observation",
            json={
                "resourceType": "Observation",
                "status": "preliminary",
                "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", "code": "vital-signs"}]}],
                "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://loinc.org", "code": "8867-4"}]},
                "valueQuantity": {"value": value, "unit": "bpm"}
            },
            headers=<clinician_auth_headers>
        )
    resp_ok = post_hr(300)
    assert resp_ok.status_code == 201
    obs_id_ok = resp_ok.json()["id"]
    <cleanup_observation>(obs_id_ok)
    tasks_ok = requests.get(f"{<base_url>}/Task", params={"focus": f"Observation/{obs_id_ok}", "code": "review"}, headers=<clinician_auth_headers>)
    assert len(tasks_ok.json().get("entry", [])) == 0, "300 bpm should not create a review task"
    resp_oor = post_hr(301)
    assert resp_oor.status_code == 201
    obs_id_oor = resp_oor.json()["id"]
    <cleanup_observation>(obs_id_oor)
    tasks_oor = requests.get(f"{<base_url>}/Task", params={"focus": f"Observation/{obs_id_oor}", "code": "review"}, headers=<clinician_auth_headers>)
    entries = tasks_oor.json().get("entry", [])
    assert len(entries) >= 1, "301 bpm should create a review task"
    <cleanup_task>(entries[0]["resource"]["id"])

tests.name: test_vital_signs_missing_mandatory_code_returns_422
preconditions: Observation payload deliberately omits the mandatory 'code' element
actions: POST /Observation with category vital-signs but no 'code' field
Capture HTTP response status and OperationOutcome
trace: R-HLT-069: missing mandatory elements must be tested
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_vital_signs_missing_mandatory_code_returns_422(<clinician_auth_headers>, <base_url>):
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Observation",
        "status": "preliminary",
        "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", "code": "vital-signs"}]}]
    }
    resp = requests.post(f"{<base_url>}/Observation", json=payload, headers=<clinician_auth_headers>)
    assert resp.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422 but got {resp.status_code}"
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("resourceType") == "OperationOutcome"
    issues = body.get("issue", [])
    assert any(i["severity"] == "error" for i in issues), "Expected at least one error-severity issue"
    diagnostics = " ".join(i.get("diagnostics", "") + i.get("details", {}).get("text", "") for i in issues)
    assert "code" in diagnostics.lower(), "Expected issue to reference missing 'code' element"

tests.name: test_vital_signs_permission_denied_for_unauthenticated_caller
actions: POST /Observation with valid vital-signs payload but no auth token
trace: R-HLT-069: permission denial must be tested

tests.name: test_vital_signs_conflicting_state_transition_final_to_preliminary_rejected
preconditions: An Observation with status 'final' has been previously created
actions: POST /Observation with status 'final' to create a finalized record
Attempt PUT /Observation/{id} to change status back to 'preliminary'
expected: PUT reverting to 'preliminary': HTTP 409 Conflict or 422 Unprocessable Entity
trace: R-HLT-069: conflicting state transitions must be tested
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_vital_signs_conflicting_state_final_to_preliminary(<clinician_auth_headers>, <base_url>, <cleanup_observation>):
    create_payload = {
        "resourceType": "Observation",
        "status": "final",
        "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", "code": "vital-signs"}]}],
        "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://loinc.org", "code": "8867-4"}]},
        "valueQuantity": {"value": 80, "unit": "bpm"}
    }
    create_resp = requests.post(f"{<base_url>}/Observation", json=create_payload, headers=<clinician_auth_headers>)
    assert create_resp.status_code == 201
    obs_id = create_resp.json()["id"]
    <cleanup_observation>(obs_id)
    revert_payload = {**create_payload, "id": obs_id, "status": "preliminary"}
    put_resp = requests.put(f"{<base_url>}/Observation/{obs_id}", json=revert_payload, headers=<clinician_auth_headers>)
    assert put_resp.status_code in (409, 422), f"Expected 409 or 422 for illegal state transition, got {put_resp.status_code}"
    get_resp = requests.get(f"{<base_url>}/Observation/{obs_id}", headers=<clinician_auth_headers>)
    assert get_resp.json()["status"] == "final", "Status must remain 'final' after rejected transition"

tests.name: test_vital_signs_decision_table_all_mandatory_fields_present_vs_absent
preconditions: Three decision conditions: has category, has code, has valueQuantity
actions: POST payload missing only category: expect 422
POST payload missing only valueQuantity: expect 422 or 200 with dataAbsentReason
POST payload with all three present: expect 201
trace: R-HLT-069: missing mandatory elements must be tested
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_vital_signs_decision_table_mandatory_fields(<clinician_auth_headers>, <base_url>, <cleanup_observation>):
    base = {"resourceType": "Observation", "status": "preliminary",
            "category": [{"coding": [{"system": "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category", "code": "vital-signs"}]}],
            "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://loinc.org", "code": "8867-4"}]},
            "valueQuantity": {"value": 72, "unit": "bpm"}}
    no_category = {k: v for k, v in base.items() if k != "category"}
    r1 = requests.post(f"{<base_url>}/Observation", json=no_category, headers=<clinician_auth_headers>)
    assert r1.status_code == 422, f"Missing category: expected 422, got {r1.status_code}"
    no_value = {k: v for k, v in base.items() if k != "valueQuantity"}
    r2 = requests.post(f"{<base_url>}/Observation", json=no_value, headers=<clinician_auth_headers>)
    assert r2.status_code in (201, 422), f"Missing value: expected 201 or 422, got {r2.status_code}"
    if r2.status_code == 201:
        obs_id2 = r2.json().get("id")
        <cleanup_observation>(obs_id2)
    r3 = requests.post(f"{<base_url>}/Observation", json=base, headers=<clinician_auth_headers>)
    assert r3.status_code == 201, f"All fields present: expected 201, got {r3.status_code}"
    <cleanup_observation>(r3.json()["id"])
